attributes.cardDescription: How to write `static markdown` templates on CardDef, FieldDef, and FileDef — when to rely on the default HTML-to-markdown fallback, which helpers to use, and the authoring pitfalls to avoid.

cardInfo.name: Markdown Format Authoring
cardInfo.summary: Authoring `static markdown` templates: defaults, markdownEscape, markdown-helpers toolkit, delegation, and pitfalls.
